reason: Agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and reported it back in the response.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, displaying the Gamut app with sidebar showing available agents.
Found and clicked the "QA-20260619-224320-eecr" agent in the sidebar — Agent page opened, displaying chat interface with message input field ready for interaction.

Typed and sent the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message was successfully submitted and a new session titled "Browser Navigation and Page Title Lookup" was created with agent status showing "working".

Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response — Agent completed the task in approximately 13 seconds, executing multiple browser tool calls (Open Browser, Browser Get State, Close Browser) and returning the response.

Verified the response mentions "Example Domain" and took a screenshot — Screenshot confirmed the response contains "The page title is **Example Domain**." and additional confirmation: "The page at https://example.com loaded successfully, and its title is **\"Example Domain\"**. I've closed the browser."
